title: Changes to Sunshine on Bazzite
body: Bazzite noticed you are using Sunshine actively on your system! This notifier is to let you know that Sunshine will soon be removed from the base Bazzite image, and you will need to reinstall it with brew.
if: bash -c '[[ -f "$HOME/.config/sunshine/sunshine.conf" && $(journalctl --no-hostname -g sunshine -b -1 -n 1) != "-- No entries --" && $(ls /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/Cellar/ | grep sunshine) == "" ]]'
